global.description: The ad features a modern design with geometric shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Encourages users to track their spending with peace of mind.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large rectangle and a circle are centered in the ad, both outlined in a lighter shade, creating a modern and abstract look.

elements.label: Rectangle shape
elements.description: A prominent rectangle shape is positioned centrally, with a light outline, suggesting a placeholder for content.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle is placed near the rectangle, adding to the geometric theme of the ad.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text reads 'Track every euro Built for peace of mind' in a clear, bold font, centrally positioned for emphasis.
elements.text_content: Track every euro Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Start now' is located at the bottom, designed to stand out with a contrasting color.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'EarnPath' is displayed at the top left, featuring a simple and modern font.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' is positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top with the logo, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Track every euro, Built for peace of mind, Start now, EarnPath, UGC
